name: glass-clock
description: A native Pebble C watchface that raytraces the time as chunky 7-segment glass digits — refraction, reflection and randomised coloured lighting, rendered progressively so each minute develops from grainy noise toward a coherent glassy image.
author: Ross Gardiner

scripts.dev: pebble build && pebble install --emulator emery && node ../../tools/emu-tui/bin/emu-tui.js --emulator emery
